Bunti
Main Navigation GuideReferenceFor Agentsnpm

Appearance

BuntiTerminal UIs that feel like the web.

A Bun-native, zero-dependency TUI engine with live themes, 10,763 icons, mouse & motion — designed so coding agents write it fluently.

Get Started
Try it — bunx demo
View on GitHub
🤖

Built for coding agents

550+ JSDoc blocks in the shipped types, runtime hints that teach, and a generated llms.txt. Fresh-agent evals one-shot real apps from the published package.

🎨

Themes out of the box

Semantic tokens, live setTheme(), and six WCAG-gated presets converted from VS Code — Dracula, Tokyo Night, Catppuccin, Nord, One Dark Pro, GitHub Light.

✨

10,763 icons by name

The full Nerd Fonts library with TypeScript autocomplete, plus emoji swapping and graceful ASCII degradation driven by real terminal detection.

🖱️

Web-grade interaction

Mouse, hover effects, pointer cursor, click-on-release, modals with backdrop scrims and drop shadows, Spinner/Progress/Link components.

🎞️

First-class motion

Enter/exit transitions, staggered cascades, 14 easing curves, per-frame dt — time-based animation that stays smooth at 60fps.

🛟

Fast, safe, zero-dep

~0.4ms full-screen draw at 120×40 via a double-buffered diff renderer. Guaranteed terminal restore on any crash. Zero runtime dependencies, Bun-native.

Mission Control — a full dashboard in one file

Live theme switching, sparklines, Nerd Font icons, staggered entrances, mouse-clickable rows. One file, no framework.

Your VS Code theme, in the terminal

Every component styles itself from semantic tokens — swap the whole app's look in one call, live.

Smooth enough to play

Double-buffered cell diffing sends only dirty spans to the terminal — animation stays crisp.

“~90% of the feature matrix worked on the literal first run — the docs and API generated zero iterations.” — independent fresh-agent ergonomics evaluation, building a themed, animated, mouse-driven app against the published package

Try it in one line

bash
bunx @zakmandhro/bunti demo mission-control   # the dashboard above, zero install
bunx @zakmandhro/bunti doctor                 # what can YOUR terminal do?
bun add @zakmandhro/bunti                     # build your own
